name: sarawut-transport-website
description: Premium deploy-ready React + Node.js company website with admin panel and image upload for Sarawut Transport 2023 Co., Ltd.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.render-build: npm install && npm run install:all && npm run build
